one_time_description: Community Benefits Agreement with City of Toronto re: Greenlane Landfill site - $1.25M lump sum by May 2023 plus $1.25M over 13 years (subsequent event signed April 1, 2023)
economic_notes: Nation operates Paradise Bingo (1748960 Ontario Limited) and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association, both fully consolidated. OFNLP Gaming reserve of $3,351,111. Located in Muncey, Ontario.
notes: Audit is qualified due to comparability issues - Paradise Bingo was previously incorrectly accounted for under modified equity method and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association was not consolidated for 2021; both are now fully consolidated. Prior year comparative figures have been restated (Note 3) to correct overstated deferred revenue of $183,997. Revenue figures used are actuals from statement of operations (2022 actual column). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,298,795 + Health Canada $294,482 + CMHC $135,388 + Province of Ontario $583,070 + Southern First Nation Secretariat $241,305 + Union of Ontario Indians $450,333 + Stepping Stones $502,702 + Kinomaadswin Education Body $1,266,610 = $4,772,685 plus other government sources; OSR includes rental income, interest, and other income. Salaries total is sum of Schedule 1 ($925,559) + Schedule 2 ($206,030) + Schedule 3 ($507,231) = $1,638,820. Council honoraria $71,088 and staff honoraria $59,800 noted separately. No schedule of remuneration for individuals provided. Subsequent event: Community Benefits Agreement with City of Toronto for $2.5M re Greenlane Landfill.
